# AirComfort.lv

> Klimatiekārtu piegāde un uzstādīšana Latvijā / Кондиционирование воздуха в Латвии / Air conditioning in Latvia

AirComfort.lv is a professional air conditioning and heat pump supplier and installer based in Riga, Latvia. The company serves residential and commercial clients throughout Latvia.

## Services

- **Supply**: Wide range of air conditioning equipment from Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, Samsung, LG, Panasonic
- **Installation**: Professional installation with a 3-year warranty, all work completed in one day
- **Maintenance**: Regular servicing, cleaning and repairs, fast response
- **Consultation**: Free consultation and selection of the optimal solution for your space

## Product Categories

- **Home air conditioners** (split systems for apartments and houses, A+++ efficiency)
- **Air-to-Air heat pumps** (for home heating and cooling, year-round efficiency)
- **Commercial HVAC** (cassette, ducted and rooftop units for offices, shops and factories)
- **Air-to-Water heat pumps** (for underfloor heating and domestic hot water in large buildings)

## Brands

Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, Samsung, LG, Panasonic

## Contact

- Website: https://aircomfort.lv
- Email: info@aircomfort.lv
- Phone: +371 20 000 000
- Location: Riga, Latvia
- Working hours: Mon–Fri 9:00–18:00

## Languages

The website is available in Latvian (default), Russian, and English.
- https://aircomfort.lv/lv (Latvian)
- https://aircomfort.lv/ru (Russian)
- https://aircomfort.lv/en (English)
